transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-06-27]
[00:00] You: Alright, let's kick off sprint planning. We need to finalize the scope for the next two weeks.
[00:30] Speaker 1: I'll own the backend API changes for the new export feature. I can have the first draft done by end of next week, so July 4th.
[01:15] Speaker 2: I'll handle the frontend UI for the export flow. I'll sync with Speaker 1 once the API spec is ready.
[02:00] You: Great. What about the auth bug that's been reported?
[02:20] Speaker 1: That's mine too. I'll fix the session timeout issue by Wednesday, June 30th.
[03:00] Speaker 2: I'll write the release notes for the v2.1 build. I can have a draft ready by Monday.
[03:45] You: Agreed. Let's also make sure we have test coverage for the export API before merging.
[04:00] Speaker 1: Agreed — I'll add unit tests alongside the implementation.

action_items.description: Implement backend API changes for the new export feature
action_items.source_quote: I'll own the backend API changes for the new export feature. I can have the first draft done by end of next week, so July 4th.

action_items.description: Fix the session timeout auth bug
action_items.source_quote: That's mine too. I'll fix the session timeout issue by Wednesday, June 30th.

action_items.description: Implement frontend UI for the export flow
action_items.source_quote: I'll handle the frontend UI for the export flow. I'll sync with Speaker 1 once the API spec is ready.

action_items.description: Write release notes for the v2.1 build
action_items.source_quote: I'll write the release notes for the v2.1 build. I can have a draft ready by Monday.

action_items.description: Add unit tests for export API alongside implementation
action_items.source_quote: I'll add unit tests alongside the implementation.

decisions: Test coverage required for export API before merging
